category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a non-web browser for a growing list of protocols; official homepage documents source install and executable distribution.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is Bombadillo: Home; source_facts.name is bombadillo.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Bombadillo site and the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official homepage links to tildegit.org/sloum/bombadillo as source code and shows git clone https://tildegit.org/sloum/bombadillo.
tags_sources: Official homepage and package description identify Bombadillo as a terminal non-web browser; pkg.go.dev README notes gopher, gemini, finger, local, and TUI features.
